title: hypericum tomentosum subsp. pubescens
intro: Hypericum tomentosum subsp. pubescens, also known as the hairy St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hypericum tomentosum subsp. pubescens include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
